meaning: 威斯特摩兰郡[英国英格兰原郡名]
examples: Westmorland lands on a glass coffee pot, which shatters during the struggle.
Bellick takes the offensive, landing a few gut punches on Westmorland. Bellick then shoves Westmoreland onto a countertop.
Westmorland tells them he covered the hole as best he could, but it's only a matter of time before the other C.O.S notice that Bellick is missing.
Cumberland and Westmorland Wrestling, on the other hand is a much simpler sport to referee and judge.
The Westmorland and Lonsdale Liberal Democrat MP Tim Farron spoke at the demonstration.
